events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th to the inimitable Brian May! His iconic guitar work with Queen continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rocking! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger, whose energy on stage remains unmatched. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV first hit screens, changing the music landscape forever. 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the very first track played. Remember watching it?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, launching them into global superstardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and introduced us to a new era of British rock. What's your favourite track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, kicked off on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people descended on a dairy farm for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. Woodstock '69: a moment that defined a generation. Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died at his Graceland home in 1977.

angles.name: The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley today, 49 years since we lost The King. His music and legend live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur shot 30 years ago
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas, leading to his death six days later.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world was rocked by the shooting of Tupac Shakur. His legacy as one of hip-hop's most profound voices remains undiminished.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who died in London in 1970 at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix today, 56 years after his untimely death. His revolutionary guitar playing continues to shape music. What's your favourite Hendrix moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', their penultimate recorded album and one of the most recognisable covers ever. What's your go-to track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, her voice and attitude with The Pretenders are legendary. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, and solo artist, Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation and still sounding biblical. What's your top Liam track, solo or Oasis?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' re-released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' saw a UK single re-release on this day in 1975, four years after its original album and US single debut.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was re-released as a UK single, a song that continues to resonate with its message of peace. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music on the go.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 25 years since the original iPod dropped? It changed everything about portable music. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day: 64 years of 007
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking 64 years since the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007, from iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes. Who's your favourite Bond and what's your top Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. The Beatles legend was born in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to echo globally.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is timeless. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: Double Album Delight
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album' – a sprawling, eclectic masterpiece. Which track from this iconic double LP is your absolute favourite?
